# Let's load the provided JSON files and inspect
import json, os, re, math, unicodedata
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran_db = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith_db = json.load(f)

len(quran_db), len(hadith_db)

# Peek first items to see structure
quran_db[0], list(quran_db[0].keys())[:10]

import re

# Arabic diacritics range
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ''
    s = s.replace(tatweel, '')
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # normalize hamza/alef variants
    s = re.sub('[إأآٱا]', 'ا', s)
    s = re.sub('[ى]', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('[ؤئ]', 'ء', s)
    s = re.sub('[ة]', 'ه', s)
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

original_full = "إِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعْلَمُ سِرَّكَ وَسِرَّ الْعَبِيدِ. وَأَنَّهُ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَكْسِبُونَ. وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَأْكُلُونَ. وَإِنَّهُ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَسْتَعِينُونَ. وَإِنَّهُ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَدْعُونَ. وَإِنَّهُ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَكْتُمُونَ. وَإِنَّهُ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَسْتَحِلُّونَ وَمَا تَحْرُمُونَ. وَإِنَّهُ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تَسْتَعِينُون"
snippet = "إِنَّ رَبَ...ْتَعِينُون"

norm_full = normalize_ar(original_full)
norm_full[:200], len(norm_full)

# Build list of ayah_text and normalized
quran_texts = [item['ayah_text'] for item in quran_db]
quran_norm = [normalize_ar(t) for t in quran_texts]

query = "إن ربك ليعلم"
norm_query = normalize_ar(query)
candidates = [(i, quran_texts[i]) for i, t in enumerate(quran_norm) if norm_query in t]
len(candidates), candidates[:10]

from difflib import SequenceMatcher

candidate_text = quran_db[i]['ayah_text']
norm_cand = normalize_ar(candidate_text)

def similarity(a,b):
    return SequenceMatcher(None, a, b).ratio()

sim = similarity(norm_full, norm_cand)
sim

# search "تستعينون"
query2 = "تستعينون"
norm_query2 = normalize_ar(query2)
[(i, quran_texts[i]) for i,t in enumerate(quran_norm) if norm_query2 in t][:10]

# Search hadith for "وإن ربك ليعلم" or "تستعينون"
hadith_items = []
# The hadith db likely has objects with keys like 'hadithTxt' or 'Matn'
# Let's inspect sample
list(hadith_db[0].keys())[:20], hadith_db[0]

# Compute SequenceMatcher ratio between norm_full and all quran verses normalized
sims = []
for i, t in enumerate(quran_norm):
    sims.append((similarity(norm_full, t), i))
sims.sort(reverse=True)
top_quran = [(score, quran_db[i]['surah_name'], quran_db[i]['ayah_id'], quran_db[i]['ayah_text']) for score,i in sims[:10]]
top_quran

def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = set(a.split())
    tb = set(b.split())
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    inter = ta & tb
    prec = len(inter)/len(ta)
    rec = len(inter)/len(tb)
    if prec+rec == 0: return 0.0
    f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1, prec, rec, len(inter), len(ta), len(tb)

f1,prec,rec, *_ = token_f1(norm_full, norm_cand)
f1, prec, rec

# Compute token F1 across all verses
f1s = []
for idx, t in enumerate(quran_norm):
    f1, prec, rec, *_ = token_f1(norm_full, t)
    f1s.append((f1, idx, prec, rec))
f1s.sort(reverse=True)
top_f1 = [(f1, quran_db[idx]['surah_name'], quran_db[idx]['ayah_id'], quran_db[idx]['ayah_text']) for f1, idx,_,_ in f1s[:10]]
top_f1

def token_f12(a,b):
    ta = set(a.split())
    tb = set(b.split())
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0, 0, 0
    inter = ta & tb
    prec = len(inter)/len(ta)
    rec = len(inter)/len(tb)
    f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec) if (prec+rec)>0 else 0.0
    return f1, prec, rec, len(inter), len(ta), len(tb)

f1s = []
for idx, t in enumerate(quran_norm):
    f1, prec, rec, intersz, ta, tb = token_f12(norm_full, t)
    f1s.append((f1, idx, prec, rec, intersz, ta, tb))
f1s.sort(reverse=True)
[(f1, quran_db[idx]['surah_name'], quran_db[idx]['ayah_id'], quran_db[idx]['ayah_text']) for f1, idx, *_ in f1s[:15]]

# Search for occurrences in quran of "تستحلون", "تحرمون", "تدعون", "تستعينون"
for word in ["تستحلون","تحرمون","تدعون","تستعينون","تكسبون","تأكلون"]:
    hits = [(i, quran_db[i]['surah_name'], quran_db[i]['ayah_id'], quran_db[i]['ayah_text'])
            for i,t in enumerate(quran_texts) if word in t]
    print(word, len(hits))
    for h in hits[:5]:
        print(" ", h)
